Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-kun. We were just talking about you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let me introduce you to Amada-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}Nice to meet you. My name is Ken Amada.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}I attend Gekkoukan Elementary School.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Be friends with him, alright? He's a good kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}Really? I think it's pretty normal to greet someone new like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Elementary school kids these days seem more grown up, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Amada-kun drops by the shrine pretty often.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's close to our dorm, you know. So if you ever see him, say hello, okay, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}Yukari-san and Junpei-san often help me out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}Especially Yukari-san! Her advice is very useful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}I don't say anything that special, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Amada-kun is surprisingly reliable. And he's so much more mature than Stupei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, you can come to me for advice too, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}All your problems and concerns will be solved, 100% satisfaction guaranteed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I've been chatting with Amada-kun today, and boy, he really is mature, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He definitely acts a lot more adult than Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2036 0 0}Geez, Yuka-tan, that's mean! How 'bout you? You think I'm totally the more mature one, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2026 0 0}Booyah! You hear that, Yuka-tan? Guess I was right and you were wrong! Ha![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}Wait, you too!? C'mon, man, that's messed up, ganging up on me like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7038 0 0}Well, to me, Junpei-san is like a grown-up, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's really tall, and he has a lot of interesting things to say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess it takes a certain "maturity" to realize it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}Oh, c'mon! You're basically just making him pity you... Sorry about that, Amada-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Amada-kun was just telling us about the elementary school dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7075 0 0}Speaking of which, {f 4 1}-san lives in the school dorms too, doesn't he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}He lives in the same dorm as me, Yuka-tan, and the others.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7123 0 0}What? It's okay for boys and girls to stay in the same dorm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Um, actually, it's usually not... But our dorm has some special circumstances.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}We're just cool like that. Right, {f 4 2}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2067 0 0}What're the rules like at the elementary school dorm?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is it less strict, since it's all kids?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have to put away whatever we take out, and we need permission to take food from the fridge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Pretty much stuff that's just common sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2138 0 0}Oh... That sounds more strict than I thought...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}...Junpei, why don't you go live at the elementary school dorm and learn some discipline?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}You all come to the shrine quite often, huh? Well, me too, I guess...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7033 0 0}No specific reason... I just feel like I can relax here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Still, it's kind of a weird place for a kid to relax. Are you sure you're in elementary school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7033 0 0}Yeah, I do play with my friends sometimes, but I just wasn't in the mood today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know the feeling. Sometimes, it's nice to just relax in silence, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have to leave soon, though, since I left in the middle of doing my homework to come here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}Come to think of it, this is where we first met Amada, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7132 0 0}That's right. Junpei-san was the first one who came up to talk to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}Then Yukari-san started coming too and offered to help me out with some stuff.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}You know Junpei. He'd get chummy with just about anyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was just worried that he might be bothering Amada-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}You don't gotta put it like that, Yuka-tan...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, anyone would reach out to someone if they looked lonely, right?[n]{f 1 1}
